kids_headings.usage: H1, H2, large buttons, playful modules in kid view

body_and_parent.usage: Parent dashboard, body text, readable blocks, labels

kids_dashboard.grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) with large, friendly, asymmetrical blocks
kids_dashboard.alignment: Optical alignment, visual icons favored over dense text

components.buttons: Large hit areas (min-h-[56px] for kids). Rounded-full. Playful hover lift (-translate-y-1) and soft shadow.
components.cards: Neumorphic tactile variant or flat with soft diffuse shadows. Crisp inner borders for parents, soft borderless colored blocks for kids.
components.icons: lucide-react with thick stroke (2.5px) for kids.
components.crisis_access: Persistent soft orange floating action button or header item: 'Talk to an Adult' or 'Get Help'. Accessible from every screen.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Gentle scale (scale-105) and translate-y-1 for interactive kids' cards.
motion_and_interactions.breathing_exercise: Framer Motion expanding/contracting circles with soft glows.
motion_and_interactions.feedback: Micro-interactions on mood selection, playful bounces on streak/reward completion.

image_urls.description: Soft sunny sky clouds for header or calming background
Parent and child happy connection image for parent dashboard empty states

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='mood-emoji-happy'.
accessibility_and_testing.text_to_speech: Visual 'Read Aloud' icon buttons (speaker icon) next to all text blocks in the kid dashboard.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio even with pastel palettes by using Deep Navy (#1D3557) text, avoiding pure black to reduce cognitive strain.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React and Tailwind CSS.
Do not use generic Inter font. Install and apply Fredoka for kid headings and Nunito for body/parents.
Create two distinct layouts: A highly visual, playful Bento Grid for the Kid Dashboard, and a structured Summary-first layout for the Parent Dashboard.
For the breathing exercise, implement a smooth Framer Motion expanding/contracting animation.
Ensure 'Read Aloud' text-to-speech visual cues exist for the AI Chat Buddy and Affirmations.
Implement the 'Get Help Now' crisis resource gently but prominently using the Soft Orange palette.
Use the provided image URLs for mascots and backgrounds. Do not use placeholder text or dummy image URLs.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
